name: §2.26 validator passes a conformant customer-agent template (all five fields present)
command:
mkdir -p custom && printf -- '---
name: ok
grounding_sources:
  - rag
refusal_template: "I do not have grounding"
per_turn_cost_target: 1000
audit_log: log.jsonl
safety_classifier_hook: hook.sh
---
body
' > custom/ok.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_customer/validate.sh" --dir custom 2>err.txt && grep -q 'PASS ok.md' err.txt && grep -q 'total_fail=0' err.txt && echo passed 1>&2
